status.readyToClockOut: Status: Clocked in, waiting to clock out

info.locationDependencyMissing: GPS capture is not enabled in this build. Update the app before punching.
info.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Login and punches require the current location.
info.locationUnavailable: Location data is unavailable. Please try again.
info.networkAvailableWithTimeZone: Backend reachability check completed, store timezone {{timeZone}}
info.networkUnavailable: Network reachability check failed. This punch will be sent for manual review

dailyRecords.title: Daily Records
dailyRecords.noSchedule: No published shift for this day.
dailyRecords.awaitingShift: Clock-out record will appear after a shift is scheduled.
dailyRecords.alertSelectedDate: You are viewing a selected date. Punch actions are only available for today.
dailyRecords.alertHoliday: This day is marked as {{holidayName}}. Confirm with the store before punching.
dailyRecords.alertVerificationCaptured: This punch will include the current verification data.
dailyRecords.alertVerificationSentForReview: Location capture and network verification are required before punching.
dailyRecords.alertNoSchedule: There is no shift for this date. Contact the manager if work needs to be arranged.

scanner.title: Scan the POS attendance QR code
scanner.permissionDescription: Allow camera access to scan the POS attendance QR code.

backgroundLocation.title: Shift location notice
backgroundLocation.description: During an active shift, including when the app is in the background, the app uses your location for attendance verification.

locationPermission.title: Location access required
locationPermission.description: Punching requires location access. During an active shift, background location access is also required for attendance verification. Update the permission in Settings, then try again.
locationPermission.openSettingsFailed: Unable to open Settings. Open the Settings app manually and allow location access for HB.

holidayManagement.empty: No public holidays for this store.
holidayManagement.syncUnsupportedJurisdiction: This store must have an NSW or QLD postcode/state before syncing public holidays.

leaveManagement.empty: No sick or annual leave approvals pending
leaveManagement.noEligibleEmployees: There are no full-time or part-time employees in this store who can submit annual or sick leave.
leaveManagement.attachmentRequired: Sick leave requires a medical certificate photo.

messages.permissionRequired: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
messages.captureFailed: Failed to take a photo. Please try again.
messages.attachmentRequired: Please upload a medical certificate photo first.
messages.cameraReady: Take a clear photo of the medical certificate and upload it.

camera.title: Take medical certificate photo
camera.permissionDescription: Allow camera access to take and upload a medical certificate photo for sick leave.

scheduleManagement.publishSubtitle: Employees can see this week's official schedule after publishing.
scheduleManagement.quickEntrySubtitle: Pick an employee and day first, then use presets or the HH/MM scroller to create a shift.

messages.loginRequired: Please sign in before using attendance.
messages.noManagedStoreDescription: This account has no managed stores, or the latest permissions have not synced.
messages.qrTrackingWarning: Clock-in succeeded, but shift location tracking is not active. Allow Always location access, then retry from Attendance.
messages.qrRequired: Scan the POS attendance QR code to punch.
messages.qrFormatInvalid: This is not a valid POS attendance QR code.
messages.qrInvalidSignature: The QR signature is invalid. Ask the store to refresh the code.
messages.qrDecryptFailed: The attendance QR key could not be decrypted. Ask the store to re-register this POS.
messages.qrKeyInvalid: This POS attendance key is invalid. Ask the store to re-register this POS.
messages.qrKeyUnknown: This POS attendance key is unknown.
messages.qrKeyRevoked: This POS attendance key has been revoked.
messages.qrNotActive: This attendance QR code is not active yet.
messages.qrExpired: This attendance QR code has expired. Scan the refreshed code.
messages.qrPunchAuthorizationInvalid: The punch authorization is invalid. Scan the QR code again.
messages.qrPunchAuthorizationExpired: Punch processing timed out. Scan the QR code again.
messages.qrDeviceDisabled: This POS device is disabled for attendance.
messages.qrDeviceMismatch: The QR code does not match its registered POS device. Ask the store to refresh it.
messages.qrStoreForbidden: You do not have attendance access to the QR code's store.
messages.qrGpsRequired: A current precise GPS location is required to punch.
messages.qrNetworkRequired: Your phone must be online to submit a QR punch.
messages.qrCameraPermissionRequired: Camera access is required to scan the attendance QR code.
messages.qrDayComplete: Today's clock-in and clock-out are already complete.
messages.punchVerificationSentForReview: Location or network verification is incomplete. The punch was prepared with review metadata.
messages.locationRequiredForPunch: Punching requires your current precise location. Allow location access and try again.
messages.backgroundLocationRequiredForClockIn: Location access is required during an active shift for attendance verification. Allow location access and try again.
messages.locationTrackingFailed: The punch was submitted, but shift location tracking could not start. Reopen the app or contact an administrator.
messages.openMapFailed: No map app is available on this device, or the system refused to open the map link.
